function solve(nums: number[], k: number): number {
    let totalSum = nums.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
    let prefixSum = 0;
    let dpPrev = 0;
    const maxVal = new Array(k).fill(-Infinity);
    maxVal[0] = 0;
    
    for (let i = 0; i < nums.length; i++) {
        prefixSum += nums[i];
        const currentMod = prefixSum % k;
        // Compute current_max
        let currentMax = maxVal[currentMod] + prefixSum;
        // current_dp is the max between dpPrev and currentMax
        const currentDP = Math.max(dpPrev, currentMax);
        // Update maxVal for currentMod
        if (currentDP - prefixSum > maxVal[currentMod]) {
            maxVal[currentMod] = currentDP - prefixSum;
        }
        dpPrev = currentDP;
    }
    return totalSum - dpPrev;
}
